metadata.title: Archiver
metadata.description: Move completed tasks to an archive with a date tree

regex.source: Notice("Failed to read the daily note template")
regex.target: Notice("无法读取每日笔记模板")

regex.source: .error(`Failed to read the daily note template '${templatePath}'`, err)
regex.target: .error(`无法读取每日笔记模板 '${templatePath}'`, err)

regex.source: name: "Here's what the result looks like:"
name: "A task has one of statuses"
name: "And the file path matches one of patterns"
regex.target: name: "且文件路径匹配以下模式之一"

regex.source: name: "And the task text matches one of patterns"
regex.target: name: "且任务文本匹配以下模式之一"

regex.source: name: "Sort top-level tasks alphabetically before archiving"
regex.target: name: "归档前按字母顺序排序顶层任务"

regex.source: name: "Add newlines around the archive heading"
regex.target: name: "在归档标题前后添加空行"

regex.source: name: "Archive a task only if its subtasks are done"
regex.target: name: "仅当子任务完成时才归档任务"

regex.source: name: "What kind of file to use?"
name: "Append some metadata to task before archiving"
regex.target: name: "归档前为任务添加元数据"

regex.source: name: "Archive tasks including nested tasks in this file"
regex.target: name: "归档此文件中的任务(包括嵌套任务)"

regex.source: name: "Sort tasks in list under cursor"
regex.target: name: "排序光标处列表中的任务"

regex.source: name: "Toggle task done and archive it"
regex.target: name: "切换任务完成状态并归档"

regex.source: description: "Add a pattern per line. No patterns means all files will match"
regex.target: description: "每行添加一个模式。无模式表示匹配所有文件"

regex.source: description: "Add a pattern per line. No patterns means all tasks will match"
regex.target: description: "每行添加一个模式。无模式表示匹配所有任务"

regex.source: description: "Only archive tasks matching this pattern, typically '#task' but can be anything."
regex.target: description: "仅归档匹配此模式的任务，通常是'#task'但可以是任何内容"

regex.source: description: "Archive tasks with symbols other than 'x' (like '[>]', '[-]', etc.)"
regex.target: description: "归档带有非'x'符号的任务(如'[>]'、'[-]'等)"

regex.source: description: "You can use it to remove tags from your archived tasks. Note that this replacement is applied to all the list items in the completed task"
regex.target: description: "可用于从归档任务中移除标签。注意此替换会应用于已完成任务中的所有列表项"

regex.source: description: "If checked, the archiver will search for a file based on the pattern and will try to create it if needed"
regex.target: description: "勾选后，归档器将根据模式查找文件并在需要时尝试创建"

regex.source: description: "If you pick \"Daily note\", your daily note template is going to be used when creating it"
regex.target: description: "如果选择\"每日笔记\"，创建时将使用您的每日笔记模板"

regex.source: description: "When disabled, no headings will get created"
regex.target: description: "禁用后将不会创建标题"

regex.source: description: "Define rules for handling tasks that match certain conditions"
regex.target: description: "定义处理符合特定条件任务的规则"
